nasb.text: So the churches were being strengthened in the faith, and were increasing in number daily.

esv.text: So the churches were strengthened in the faith, and they increased in numbers daily.

cnv.text: 於是眾教會信心越發堅固，人數天天增加。

ccb.text: 这样，众教会在信仰上得到坚固，人数天天都在增加。

csbs.text: 这样，各教会在信仰上得了坚固，人数也天天增加。
